"[29] CAL FIRE ADV ENGINE 97 AT 36.729364/-120.3378884 THEY WILL ADV ENGINE TO 1023 FOR CHP/ ENGINE ADV SPOKE TO FISHERMAN THAT ADV SUBJ WAS POSS TRYING TO RETRIEVE A CAPSIZED WHI BOAT FRM THE WATER WHEN PK TK WENT INTO THE WATER/ THIS INFORMATION IS NOT CONFIRMED/ CAL FIRE ENGINE ADV NEG VIS ON THE PK TRK/ ENGINE DOES HAVE VIS OF THE CAPSIZED BOAT"
"[26] CAL FIRE ADV HELO IS 10-23 ING UNTIL THEY CAN ACCERTAIN IF RESCUE OR RECOVERY"

"[24] ENGINES ARE 97 JSO 180 JEO SLOUGH- ADV THEY HAVE A WITNESS THAT DIDN'T SEE A SUBJ EXIT VEG/ ANOTHER RP ADV A BOAT TOOK THE SUBJ OUT OF THE VEH/ CONFLICTING REPORTS/ AS OF RIGHT NOW UNK IF RESCUE OR RECOVERY/ FIRE TALKING TO POSS WITNESSES"

"[17] A65-411 1097 W/ THE DRIVER, JWO SAN MATEO"
